name: scandit-ai-orchestrator
description: Orquestrador para o projeto Detector de Fake News Scandit.AI

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend-new && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,ML_SERVICE" -c "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ml"
